Now let me disassemble the key functions to extract the exact parameters and algorithm.

{"analysis":"I have all the function addresses. Now I need to disassemble the key functions to understand the exact ray tracing algorithm and scene parameters.","plan":"1. Disassemble main, trace, sky_color, sphere_intersect, plane_intersect, is_in_shadow, and the vector operations
2. Extract exact scene parameters (camera position, light direction, sphere positions/radii/colors, plane parameters)
3. Write the C program","commands":[{"keystrokes":"objdump -d --no-show-raw-insn /app/mystery | sed -n '/^0*401740 </,/^0*4[0-9a-f]* </p' | head -200
","duration":1}]}
